title: Reelo Baruk's Garbage Processing Facility
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Reelo_trash.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Reelo Baruk|Reelo's]] garbage compactors]]
[[Reelo Baruk]] ran a '''garbage-hauling company''' on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] as a front for his criminal activities. His garbage-processing plant appeared to unsuspecting people as a warehouse with [[Garbage compactor/Legends|garbage compactors]] and incinerators. However, concealed beneath it was a hideout from which he ran his criminal empire.

[[Kyle Katarn]] infiltrated the facility to search for Reelo in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], after gathering information from [[Baruk's Bar]]. He reached the command-center levels by obtaining the password to the hidden sections from [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who had been imprisoned by Reelo. When Kyle reached the [[Reelo Baruk's hideout|command center]], Reelo escaped from the facility, but Kyle was able to clear out his thugs and rescue Lando. Reelo was killed a short time later attempting to ambush Kyle and Lando at the nearest starport. The entirety of this mission is referred to as the [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Empire Reborn)|Third Mission to Nar Shaddaa]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''
